data.title: 4ee6-ff6f: Task B — Add Step 7.1 scope-drift review to fix-bug SKILL.md and dso-config.conf
data.description:
## Story
4ee6-ff6f — fix-bug runs scope-drift reviewer after Step 7 verification and before Gates 2a-2d

## testing_mode
UPDATE

## TDD (GREEN phase — makes Task A tests pass)
Modify plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md to add Step 7.1, and add scope_drift.enabled to .claude/dso-config.conf. All 6 tests in test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh turn GREEN after this task.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- .claude/dso-config.conf

## Required Changes to fix-bug/SKILL.md

### New Step 7.1: Scope-Drift Review
Insert between Step 7 (Verify Fix) and Gate 2a (Reversal Check):

#### Section header
'### Step 7.1: Scope-Drift Review (/dso:fix-bug)'

#### Config check (first action)
Read scope_drift.enabled via read-config.sh; if false, skip Step 7.1 entirely and proceed to Gate 2a.

#### Agent file existence check (hard-fail)
Read plugins/dso/agents/scope-drift-reviewer.md using the Read tool. If the Read tool errors (file not found), ABORT Step 7.1 with a clear error message — do NOT silently skip and proceed to Gates 2a-2d. Hard-fail is required per done definition.

#### Dispatch pattern (mirrors intent-search Step 1.5)
If Agent tool is available: dispatch scope-drift-reviewer agent (subagent_type: dso:scope-drift-reviewer) with inputs: ticket_text, root_cause_report, git_diff (from git diff --staged or working tree diff), investigation-identified files.

Inline fallback (when Agent tool unavailable — sub-agent context): read plugins/dso/agents/scope-drift-reviewer.md inline and execute its instructions directly with the same inputs. Set SCOPE_DRIFT_OUTPUT from the result.

#### Response handling (three-way routing)
Based on SCOPE_DRIFT_OUTPUT drift_classification or triggered field:
- **No-drift (triggered: false, drift_classification: in_scope)**: proceed to Gate 2a without friction
- **Minor-drift (triggered: true, drift_classification: ambiguous)**: emit warning to stdout, proceed to Gate 2a
- **Major-drift (triggered: true, drift_classification: out_of_scope)**: prompt user for explicit approval before proceeding; present the agent evidence and await user response
  - Non-interactive mode (FIX_BUG_INTERACTIVE=false): defer as INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED ticket comment, proceed as if no-drift

### SCOPE_DRIFT_OUTPUT in printf list
In the gate signals collection section (the printf '%s' block with GATE_1B_OUTPUT, GATE_2A_OUTPUT, etc.), add SCOPE_DRIFT_OUTPUT to the list so scope_drift signal feeds the escalation router.

### Step 7.5 precondition update
In Step 7.5 (Anti-Pattern Scan), update the entry condition comment to note that Step 7.5 runs after Step 7.1 scope-drift review has passed (or was skipped).

## Required Changes to .claude/dso-config.conf
Add: scope_drift.enabled=true (with comment: # scope-drift reviewer gate after Step 7 verify fix)

## .test-index Update (REQUIRED)
Remove RED marker [test_scope_drift_step_exists] from the entry:
- BEFORE: plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md: tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh [test_scope_drift_step_exists]
- AFTER: plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md: tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] fix-bug/SKILL.md contains a 'Step 7.1' section header
  Verify: grep -q 'Step 7.1' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] scope_drift.enabled config check is present in Step 7.1
  Verify: grep -q 'scope_drift.enabled' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] Hard-fail language is present for missing scope-drift-reviewer.md
  Verify: grep -q 'abort\|hard-fail\|ABORT' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] major-drift user prompt documented
  Verify: grep -q 'major.drift\|major_drift' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] minor-drift warning documented
  Verify: grep -q 'minor.drift\|minor_drift' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] SCOPE_DRIFT_OUTPUT in printf list section
  Verify: grep -q 'SCOPE_DRIFT_OUTPUT' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] scope_drift.enabled=true added to .claude/dso-config.conf
  Verify: grep -q 'scope_drift.enabled' .claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: grep 'test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index && ! grep 'test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh.*\[test_scope_drift_step_exists\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] All 6 tests in test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh pass
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-scope-drift-step.sh 2>&1 | grep -c 'PASS:' | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
